title: non_exhaustive on SieveErrorKind is intentional
description: parse_error.rs: #[non_exhaustive] on SieveErrorKind is explicitly documented with a rationale comment. A contributor might suggest removing it to avoid callers needing a _ arm. Do not remove it: the set of error kinds will grow as extensions are added, and breaking all downstream callers on every extension addition is worse than requiring a _ arm from day one. The current approach is correct API hygiene for a library at 0.1.0.
